case_title: NASIR PATEL VS. DON PHILIP BENORDEN

docket_entries.description: REMARK: FILE IS DESTROYED PURSUANT TO GOVERNMENT CODE SECTION 68153. ORDER SIGNED AND FILED ON DEC-30-2024.
SUMMONS ON COMPLAINT, PROOF OF SERVICE ONLY, FILED BY PLAINTIFF PATEL, NASIR SERVED DEC-09-2014, PERSONAL SERVICE AS TO DEFENDANT BENORDEN, DON PHILIP
DECLARATION OF DAILY RENTAL VALUE FILED BY PLAINTIFF PATEL, NASIR
EXECUTION FOR POSSESSION OF REAL PROPERTY ISSUED TO SAN FRANCISCO COUNTY AS TO DEFENDANT BENORDEN, DON PHILIP
UNLAWFUL DETAINER - RESIDENTIAL, COMPLAINT FILED BY PLAINTIFF PATEL, NASIR AS TO DEFENDANT BENORDEN, DON PHILIP SUMMONS ISSUED, JUDICIAL COUNCIL CIVIL CASE COVER SHEET FILED
RECEIVED REQUEST FOR ENTRY OF DEFAULT, CLERK'S JUDGMENT FILED BY PLAINTIFF PATEL, NASIR AS TO DEFENDANT BENORDEN, DON PHILIP
REQUEST FOR ENTRY OF DEFAULT/DEFAULT ENTERED, CLERK'S JUDGMENT, DECLARATION OF NON-MILITARY STATUS AS TO DEFENDANT BENORDEN, DON PHILIP
DECLARATION IN LIEU OF PERSONAL TESTIMONY, PER CCP 585(D). FILED BY PLAINTIFF PATEL, NASIR
DEFAULT JUDGMENT REJECTED, PLACED IN PICKUP BOX, SUBMITTED BY PLAINTIFF PATEL, NASIR AS TO DEFENDANT BENORDEN, DON PHILIP
RETURN OF EXECUTION FOR POSSESSION OF REAL PROPERTY ISSUED TO SAN FRANCISCO COUNTY, RETURNED AND FILED, UNSATISFIED AS TO DEFENDANT BENORDEN, DON PHILIP

UNDER APPLICATION TO THE CLERK FOR JUDGMENT UNDER SEC 1169 C.C.P., IT IS ADJUDGED THAT PLAINTIFF PATEL, NASIR RECOVER FROM DEFENDANT BENORDEN, DON PHILIP THE RESTITUTION AND POSSESSION OF THE PREMISES: 2048 POLK ST. S.F. CA 94109 COUNTY OF SAN FRANCISCO #316, SEE SCANNED DOCUMENT
